tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Ships
(I. Hunter)

Intro : G#-C#M7-G#-C#

[tab]     [ch]G#[/ch]          [ch]C#M7[/ch]         [ch]D#[/ch]         [ch]C7/E[/ch]
We walked to the sea, just my father and me,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fm[/ch]           [ch]G#/Eb[/ch]        [ch]C#M7[/ch] [ch]C#[/ch]
and the dogs played around on the sand.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D#[/ch]  [ch]G#[/ch]           [ch]C#M7[/ch]       [ch]D#[/ch]          [ch]C7/E[/ch]
Winter cold cut the air hangin still everywhere,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Fm[/ch]           [ch]G#/Eb[/ch]          [ch]C#M7[/ch] [ch]C#/Eb[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]
dressed in gray, did he say, “Hold my hand”?[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#7[/ch]                                [ch]C#[/ch]        [ch]Cm[/ch]        
  I said, “Love’s easier when it’s far away.”[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]                            [ch]D#[/ch]
  We sat and watched a distant light.[/tab]

CHORUS:
 
[tab][ch]C#/Eb[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]D#m[/ch]          [ch]E(add2)[/ch] [ch]F#sus[/ch]
We’re two ships that pass in the night,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]D#m[/ch]         [ch]E(add2)[/ch] [ch]F#7sus[/ch]
we both smile and we say it’s alright.[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]B[/ch]                    [ch]D#m7[/ch]         [ch]EM7[/ch]  
We’re still here, it’s just that we’re out of sight,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G#m[/ch]        [ch]F#[/ch]          [ch]EM7[/ch] [ch]D#m/F#[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch]  [ch]C#M7[/ch]    
like those ships that pass in the ni_________ght.[/tab]
 

[tab]          [ch]G#[/ch]          [ch]C#M7[/ch]            [ch]D#[/ch]             [ch]C7/E[/ch] 
There’s a boat on the line, where the sea meets the sky,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Fm[/ch]         [ch]G#/Eb[/ch]       [ch]C#M7[/ch]  [ch]C#[/ch]
there’s another that rides far behind.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D#[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch]            [ch]C#M7[/ch]        [ch]D#[/ch]          [ch]C7/E[/ch]
and it seems you and I are like strangers, a wide[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Fm[/ch]         [ch]G#/Eb[/ch]             [ch]C#M7[/ch] [ch]C#/Eb[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch] 
ways apart as we drift on through time.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#7[/ch]                               [ch]C#[/ch]       [ch]Cm[/ch]           
   He said, its harder now, we’re far away,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]                          [ch]D#[/ch]
   We only read you when you write.[/tab]
(Repeat Chorus Except Last word)
[tab][ch]EM7[/ch]  [ch]D#m[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch]  [ch]D#m7[/ch]
Ni ______ght[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]BbM7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
We’re just ships that pass in the night,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]BbM7[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
we both smile and we say it’s alright.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A/C#[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]BbM7[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
We’re still here, it’s just that we’re out of sight,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]BbM7[/ch]  [ch]C#M7[/ch]    
Like those ships that pass in the night.[/tab]
(Repeat last four lines while fading)
